window: auto-collected from public sources (Hacker News, GitHub, Stack Overflow)
note: Auto-populated by tools/refresh.js from PUBLIC sources only. Tracks Azure AI Foundry / Azure AI Studio and the Azure OpenAI model deployments that run under Foundry. Items are heuristically categorized and flagged auto_collected:true (verified:false). Every item links to its original public post.
